fixes: O1: DOCUMENTATION_STYLE_GUIDE reorganized into required core-7 sections (한 문장 정의 / 무엇 / 왜 / 어떻게 / 결과 / 판단 기준 / 구현 연결 정보) + optional extended 3 (사용자가 겪는 문제 / 입력과 출력 / 실패 신호); NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES now defers to STYLE_GUIDE and only adds the Notion-specific 하위 항목 읽는 순서
O2: post-tool-use-log.py goal_lineage now accepts CLI flag, payload list, or payload string; string from JSON is parsed through parse_goal_lineage instead of being rejected by isinstance check
O3: wiki-lint stale check falls back to file mtime when no ISO date markers are present in content
O4: rules/common/{search-first,tdd-workflow,verification-loop,security-review}.md translated to Korean, matching the Korean rewrite of rules/common/README.md
O5: wiki-lint FILE_LINE_RE now accepts an optional Windows drive letter prefix so C:\path\file.md:10 matches
O6: bootstrap template substitution now errors on duplicate needles (count > 1) in addition to missing (count == 0), preventing silent wrong-target replacement
O7: verify-skeleton skips parsing wiki-lint stdout when wiki-lint exited non-zero, so crash errors are not hidden behind malformed report parsing

data.subagent_findings: 3-agent audit; Subagent 1 found BOM crash + backslash regex concern; Subagent 2 found SESSION_CONTINUITY cold-start wording gap; Subagent 3 confirmed 10 cross-file contracts all pass
fixes: Bug #1 (HIGH): post-tool-use-log.py read_stdin_json now reads sys.stdin.buffer and decodes with utf-8-sig. Windows tools that emit UTF-8 BOM (EF BB BF) no longer crash the logging hook. Verified: BOM-prefixed stdin JSON now writes activity-log entry exit 0.

Bug #2 (MED): wiki-lint FILE_LINE_RE char class reordered to [-A-Za-z0-9_./\]+ (hyphen first literal, backslash last explicit escape) for clarity. Both old and new forms actually matched backslash paths in proper Python tests; reorder removes any ambiguity about range/escape handling.

Bug #3 (LOW): SESSION_CONTINUITY cold-start text clarified — if PROJECT_PROFILE.md is absent (manual-copy path), agent first creates it from the template before driving the dialogue. Previous wording assumed the file always exists.
data.validated_via: verify-skeleton self=clean; BOM stdin now writes valid JSONL; backslash path regex matches runtime\activity-log.jsonl:1; fresh bootstrap still clean

tool_call.summary: skeleton_audit_round18_bug_fixes

data.subagent_findings: 4-agent parallel audit: A1 runtime/edge-case; A2 cross-platform; A3 doc-code contracts; A4 end-to-end UX
fixes_applied: HIGH A1: post-tool-use-log concurrent-write race - added fcntl/msvcrt advisory file lock around append with seek-to-end under lock. Verified with 10 parallel subprocess writers.
MED A1: post-tool-use-log json.dumps allow_nan=False so NaN/Infinity payloads are rejected instead of silently corrupting JSONL.
MED A1: post-tool-use-log coerce non-dict data field to {} so data:null no longer emits JSON null.
MED A1: verify-skeleton check_clarifications now tracks multi-line fenced blocks; markers inside fenced examples no longer flagged as open.
MED A1: verify-skeleton activity-log/agent-runs parsers switched to utf-8-sig so Notepad-added BOM does not error.
MED A2: rules/common/README and PROJECT_PROFILE.template NEEDS-CLARIFICATION search snippet now includes POSIX grep and Windows Select-String alternatives alongside rg.

MED A3: AGENTS operating-rules activity-log bullet now points at scripts/hooks/post-tool-use-log.py plus RUNTIME_EVENT_SCHEMA plus handoff_saved event; scripts/hooks/README gained When-to-invoke section; SESSION_CONTINUITY 구현 연결 정보 gained hook-script and schema pointers so handoff_saved is discoverable.
HIGH A4: skeleton scratch files runtime/tmp-regex2.py and tmp-regex3.py deleted; bootstrap SKIP_FILE_PREFIXES (tmp-, scratch-) added so future scratch files auto-excluded from new projects.
HIGH A4: seed_project_profile now allow-lists factual sections only (기본 정보/목표/프로젝트별 맥락/활성 운영 선택/첫 반복 체크리스트) - seeded PROFILE no longer ships with template meta-prose.
housekeeping: runtime/activity-log.jsonl line 43 (round17 entry) was missing one closing brace; repaired in place so verify-skeleton activity_log_parse now clean.

tool_call.summary: skeleton_audit_round20_bug_fixes

data.subagent_findings: 4-agent parallel audit: C1 meta-audit rounds 17/18/19; C2 link integrity across all docs; C3 performance/scalability; C4 dead code/orphan files
fixes_applied: C1 (no regressions): all 7 recent fixes verified under live tests - lock holds under 20 parallel writers, allow_nan rejects cleanly, fence tracking handles nested/lang-tagged/mid-line edge cases, symlink defense-in-depth safe, 0-byte PROFILE warns, agent-runs.jsonl lines 1 and 2 schema-conformant, FILE_LINE_RE matches all 5 probes.

C3 (scalability): added scripts/rotate-activity-log.py - cross-platform, dry-run default, atomic os.replace, advisory-locks source and archive, emits log_archived event. Updated docs/RUNTIME_EVENT_SCHEMA.md and scripts/README.md to reference it.
C3 (observation): wiki-lint scales linearly (1000x10KB=16s); verify-skeleton 30s subprocess timeout adequate today but may need raising past ~1500 knowledge files. Logged as observation not fix.

tool_call.summary: skeleton_audit_round21_bug_fixes

data.subagent_findings: 4-agent parallel audit: D1 rotate-activity-log stress test; D2 testability/CI-readiness; D3 AGENTS-vs-CLAUDE instruction drift; D4 onboarding narrative coherence
fixes_applied: CRITICAL D1: rotate-activity-log concurrent rotation double-archive race - two simultaneous --apply both read 10500-line source and both appended 10000 lines to archive. Fixed with sidecar runtime/.{base}.rotation.lock held across plan+apply cycle; re-read source after lock acquired.

MED D1: rotate-activity-log Windows lock fragility - msvcrt.locking(LK_LOCK) retries ~10s then raises OSError silently swallowed. Fixed with 60s polling loop (time.sleep 0.1); seek to offset 0 so lock does not fail on empty files.

D2: no Python tests existed. Added tests/test_smoke.py (5 tests, stdlib unittest, 1.5s run) - py_compile all scripts, --help for 4 main scripts, verify-skeleton --skip-wiki-lint, rotate-activity-log dry-run, new-project bootstrap + verify. Added tests/README.md explaining why no CI file (skeleton is copied, CI is per-project). Added tests/__init__.py.
D2: verify-skeleton.py gained check_scripts_compile using py_compile.compile doraise=True on every scripts/**/*.py - syntax errors now caught by verify-skeleton instead of runtime.
D3: CLAUDE.md L37 added 전체 운영 규칙은 AGENTS.md가 canonical pointer.
D3: CLAUDE.md L40 logging bullet expanded to name scripts/hooks/post-tool-use-log.py, runtime/activity-log.jsonl, and handoff_saved event - Claude readers no longer blind to schema.
D3: AGENTS.md L38 skill-activation rule gained project-local (<project>/.claude/skills/) vs user-global (~/.claude/skills/) precedence and conflict rule matching CLAUDE.md.
D4: CLAUDE.md and README.md added canonical pointer to rules/common/README.md for [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] marker definition.
D4: AGENTS.md line 74 목표 계보 (goal lineage) gained parenthetical definition at first use.
D4: README.md decision-phase option drift - was 3 options (계속/수정/보류), aligned to OPERATING_LOOP canonical 4 (계속/수정/재설계/중단) with pointer to §6.
data.validated_via: verify-skeleton self=clean (now includes py_compile pass); python -m unittest discover -s tests=5/5 passing in 1.958s; CLAUDE.md=52 lines (limit 60 preserved); rotate-activity-log double-archive regression test now passes under concurrent --apply.

tool_call.summary: skeleton_audit_round22_bug_fixes

data.subagent_findings: 4-agent parallel audit: E1 smoke-test quality; E2 Korean text quality; E3 bootstrap edge cases; E4 error message quality
fixes_applied: CRITICAL E3: bootstrap --force silently overwrote user PROJECT_PROFILE.md + knowledge/*.md + session-handoff.md + settings.local.json (data loss). Added pre-flight collision check listing offending files and refusing with actionable message.
HIGH E3: bootstrap accepted --target inside skeleton (polluted skeleton with inner/ subtree). Added is_relative_to(target, source) check that refuses with clear message.

HIGH E3: bootstrap --target with Windows long-path prefix \?\ caused Path.resolve to return malformed drive-relative, recursive copy of skeleton into itself until MAX_PATH blew. Added early rejection of \?\ / \?\ / //?/ / /?/ prefix forms.

HIGH E1: real bug found - stale Users/ directory in skeleton root from prior audit long-path test. Was causing WinError 206 path-too-long in test_new_project_then_verify. Removed. Suite now deterministic across 5+ back-to-back runs.
E1: mutation-tested all 5 existing smoke tests - each catches the class of regression it targets (syntax error, argparse break, missing REQUIRED_DOCS, rotate crash, seed rename).

E1: added 3 new targeted tests - test_bom_prefixed_stdin_is_accepted (guards utf-8-sig decode), test_log_outside_root_is_refused (guards --log containment), test_unknown_flag_is_rejected (guards against parse_known_args regression). Each verified via revert-to-broken state.
E4: new-project now wraps filesystem ops in friendly FileNotFoundError/PermissionError/OSError handlers instead of raw pathlib traceback - tells user which path and what to check.

E4: verify-skeleton added RECOVERY_HINTS map for 6 well-known required paths (session-handoff, index.md, etc) - missing path now tells user 'run bootstrap or copy template body from <doc>' plus fallback hint pointing to SKELETON_UPGRADE.

E4: wiki-lint parse_index_rows now returns rejection reasons - 'line X has N cells; need >= 4' and 'first cell is not a valid entry id (must match /^K[0-9A-Za-z_-]+$/, e.g. K001)'. Missing index also gets fix hint.
E2: docs/FEATURE_DECISION_GUIDE.md:110 작업 흐름 카탈로그 -> 워크플로 카탈로그 (terminology consistency).
E2: rules/common/search-first.md:9 리포지토리 -> 저장소 (terminology consistency).
E2: AGENTS.md:52 flow diagram 실행 로그 기록 -> 활동 로그 기록 (matches RUNTIME_EVENT_SCHEMA split).
E2: README.md:36 and rules/common/README.md:17 그 다음 -> 그다음 (orthography).
E2: docs/SKELETON_UPGRADE.md:127-130 four 반말 sentences inside all-존댓말 doc rewritten to 존댓말.
data.validated_via: verify-skeleton self=clean; python -m unittest discover -s tests=8/8 passing in 3.15s (was 5/5); skeleton polluting Users/ dir removed; bootstrap refuses target-in-skeleton, long-path prefix, and --force over user data; all Korean terminology now canonical.

tool_call.summary: skeleton_audit_round23_bug_fixes

data.subagent_findings: 2-agent parallel audit: F1 hook+rotation lock interaction; F2 seeded content quality
fixes_applied: CRITICAL F1: post-tool-use-log hook did NOT check rotate-activity-log sidecar rotation lock - race confirmed. Rotation reads source without lock, hook appends land between read and os.replace, os.replace atomically discards those writes = silent data loss. Stress test (unpatched): 50/50 hook writes LOST when racing with rotation.

CRITICAL F1 fix: hook now opens <log_path.parent>/.<log_path.stem>.rotation.lock and acquires the same exclusive lock rotation uses BEFORE opening the log file, held across append. Still also takes per-file byte-range lock for inter-hook serialization. On Windows msvcrt.locking is exclusive-only so hooks serialize 1:1 with rotation (acceptable - rotation is rare >10k threshold and fast).

CRITICAL F1 verified: 8/8 consecutive patched runs - total = 15051 exactly (15000 seed + 50 hooks + 1 log_archived), all 50 hook tags survive across active+archive, rotation rc=0, no duplicates, no WinError 5 crashes.
content_quality_verified_clean: F2: PROJECT_PROFILE.md seeds project_name/domain/owner/stack/created_at/status correctly; blank fields intentionally blank (agent fills during interview per Agent Fill-In Contract) - NOT pre-marked [NEEDS CLARIFICATION]
F2: session-handoff.md is fresh blank template with 신규 프로젝트 placeholder, no skeleton leakage
F2: activity-log.jsonl has exactly one bootstrap event with all required fields (ts, phase, action, project, goal_lineage, tool_call, data)
F2: knowledge/index.md canonical header, K000 bootstrap + K001 project-registry entries
F2: .claude/settings.local.json = {permissions:{allow:[]}} - skeleton's real allowlist not leaked
F2: no Initial_Architecture hardcoded references anywhere in seeded tree
F2: AGENT_REGISTRY.md byte-identical to skeleton - correct (common methodology, not project facts)
F2: verify-skeleton silent on missing [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers - aligns with design
data.validated_via: verify-skeleton self=clean; 8/8 tests passing in 1.44s; hook+rotation stress test 8/8 runs exact count with zero lost writes; seeded project content matches documented intent in all 8 checked files.

handoff_saved: AGENTS.md:72 + scripts/hooks/README.md:11-15 both document agent-responsibility nature OK

RUNTIME_EVENT_SCHEMA field validation: schema explicitly states readers tolerate missing/legacy fields - loose json.loads matches advisory contract

tool_call.summary: skeleton_audit_round25_external_pattern_adoption

modules_added: M1 MCP discipline (ECC): new rules/common/mcp-discipline.md with <=10 MCPs / <=80 tools caps; wired into rules/common/README, AGENTS.md operating rules, ECC_PAPERCLIP_PATTERNS Adopted table, and verify-skeleton REQUIRED_DOCS.

M2 PreToolUse guard template (ECC): new scripts/hooks/pre-tool-use-guard.py.example (inert by default, .example suffix). Blocks secret patterns (AWS/GitHub/OpenAI/Slack/SSH keys), dangerous commands (rm -rf /, fork bomb, mkfs, dd, chmod -R 777 /), and protected path writes (.env, id_rsa, .aws/credentials, .ssh/*). scripts/hooks/README gained PreToolUse activation section. ECC_PAPERCLIP_PATTERNS moved PreToolUse from Not Adopted Yet to Optional Template Provided.

M3 search-activity-log.py (hermes inspired): new stdlib-only CLI with --since/--until/--phase/--action/--project/--tool/--contains/--last/--jsonl filters. Default prints last 20 as table. scripts/README gained activity log query examples. RUNTIME_EVENT_SCHEMA gained 검색 section.

M4 wikilinks + broken-link check (llm_wiki): wiki-lint gained WIKILINK_RE, tracks known entry_ids from index_rows, adds wikilink_broken findings category that flags [[Kxxx]] references not in index.md. knowledge/index.md documents the [[K003]] usage convention. docs/wiki-ops/wiki-lint.md gained Wikilink broken check description.

M5 list-open-questions.py: new stdlib-only CLI aggregating [NEEDS CLARIFICATION: ...] markers across all .md files. --count/--by-file/--json/--strict modes. Skips fenced code blocks (pedagogical examples) and placeholder markers (<...>, ...). rules/common/README gained aggregator command reference.

tool_call.summary: skeleton_audit_round27_notion_duplicate_prevention

data.user_scenario: CTF 도구 문서화 중 '운영 기능 정리'와 '최종 운영 정리' 두 페이지가 같은 주제로 공존. 사후에 사용자가 구 페이지 제목에 '최종 문서로 대체됨' 표시를 붙이고 댓글로 링크를 남기는 수동 정리가 발생.
data.root_cause: 기존 NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md는 구조/스타일/DB 속성만 다뤘고, (a) 생성 전 중복 검색 (b) 대체 처리 프로토콜이 부재
fixes_applied: NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md 중복 방지 프로토콜 섹션 신설: 1단계 생성 전 DB 검색 필수 (notion-search/fetch로 제목/Feature/Layer 확인), 유사 페이지 발견 시 사용자에게 (업데이트/대체/공존) 확인.
NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md 2단계 업데이트 기본값: 기존 페이지 본문 교체, 새 페이지 생성 금지, phase=notion_sync action=page_updated 이벤트 기록.
NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md 3단계 대체 처리 프로토콜: 새 페이지 생성 후 같은 작업 안에서 구 페이지의 Superseded By/Superseded At/Status=superseded 세 필드 모두 설정; phase=notion_sync action=page_superseded 이벤트 기록.
NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md DB 속성 확장: Superseded By (Relation) + Superseded At (Date) 필요시 추가. 기본 보기에는 숨김.
NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md 활성 문서 필터: 기본 보기에 Status != superseded 암묵 기본.
NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md 실패 신호 섹션 추가: 같은 Feature에 active 페이지 2개 이상, Superseded By 비어있음, 본문에 대체됨 문장이 있는데 Status=active 남음.
NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md 검증 체크리스트에 2개 질문 추가 (생성 전 DB 검색 완료 여부, 대체 3필드 모두 설정 여부).
NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md 데이터베이스 사용 규칙에 Superseded By/Superseded At 속성 이름 명시.
AGENTS.md Notion 운영 규칙 한 줄 강화: 생성 전 DB 검색 + 대체 시 3필드 동시 설정 요구 명시, 상세 포인터를 '중복 방지 프로토콜' 앵커로 갱신.
data.enforcement_model: 런타임 강제 없음 (Notion은 스크립트 도달 밖). 프로토콜로 관리 + 활동 로그 이벤트로 감사 가능. knowledge/index.md의 supersession 모델을 Notion DB에 그대로 투영.
data.validated_via: verify-skeleton self=clean; 10/10 smoke tests passing in 1.7s; 프로토콜 문서만의 변경이라 런타임 회귀 없음.

tool_call.summary: skeleton_audit_round28_notion_dedup_skill

data.user_question: docs/*.md 파일들이 에이전트가 참고하긴 해? — 정직하게 답하면 티어 3 (상세 규칙 문서)는 부분적. AGENTS.md 요약이 context에 있는 동안만 효과. auto-compact 후는 불확실.
data.promotion_decision: Notion 중복 방지 규칙은 '다음 세션에도 반드시 작동해야 하는' 운영 규칙이므로 스킬로 승격. 기존 docs/NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md는 배경/이유 canonical로 유지.
fixes_applied: 신규 파일: .claude/skills/notion-dedup/SKILL.md — frontmatter(name+description)로 하네스가 description 매칭으로 자동 활성화
스킬 본문 섹션: When to Activate (create/update 직전, 읽기 전용 제외) / Workflow 5단계 / Trigger Examples / Safety / Failure Signals / References
Workflow 5단계는 docs/NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md '중복 방지 프로토콜'을 절차 중심으로 압축: DB 검색 → 결과 분기 → 선택별 행동 (업데이트/대체/공존) → DB 속성 확인 → 감사 이벤트
대체 처리 4단계(새 페이지 생성 → Superseded By → Superseded At → Status=superseded)가 같은 작업 안에서 모두 완료되어야 종료
제목 prefix '[대체됨]' 금지 명시 (관계+상태로 관리; 검색 결과 오염 방지)
Failure Signals 섹션으로 이미 깨진 상태 소급 적용 트리거 3가지 (같은 Feature에 active 2개, Superseded By 빈 값, 본문에 '대체됨' 있는데 Status=active)
no_edits_needed: AGENTS.md: 라운드 27 요약 한 줄이 이미 상세 docs를 가리킴. 스킬은 description 매칭으로 자동 활성화라 중복 참조 불필요
.claude/settings.json: 스킬은 SKILL.md 존재만으로 등록됨. 설정 변경 불요
verify-skeleton REQUIRED_DOCS: 기존 4개 시드 스킬(search-first 등)도 REQUIRED_DOCS에 없음. 일관성 유지
docs/NOTION_DOCUMENTATION_RULES.md: 배경/이유 canonical 문서로 변경 없이 유지. 스킬이 참조만 함
data.harness_registration_verified: 세션 중 system reminder에 notion-dedup skill이 available skills 목록에 자동 추가된 것을 직접 확인. description 기반 활성화 모델 실증.
data.validated_via: verify-skeleton self=clean; 10/10 smoke tests passing in 1.72s; bootstrap to /tmp/dedup-rt 성공 후 .claude/skills/notion-dedup/SKILL.md 전파 확인; 새 프로젝트 verify=clean.

reading_tier_note.conclusion: 중요 규칙은 스킬, 참고 가이드는 docs. 이번 라운드에서 Notion dedup만 스킬로 승격. code-style/directory-layout/ephemeral-files는 docs에 유지.
